name: CustIQ Basic Savings Account
description: A zero-balance savings account with free digital banking, UPI, and debit card. Ideal for salaried individuals beginning their banking journey.

name: CustIQ Premium Savings Account
description: High-value savings account with preferential interest rate, relationship manager, and exclusive lifestyle benefits. Suited for Affluent and HNI customers.

name: CustIQ Current Account (Business)
description: Current account designed for SMEs and business owners with high transaction volumes, overdraft facility, and dedicated business banking support.
features: Business debit card with ₹5 lakh daily limit
Business internet banking with bulk payment
Free cash deposit up to ₹5 lakhs/month

name: CustIQ NRI Savings Account
description: Non-Resident Indian savings account in INR with full repatriability of interest earned, tax exemption on interest, and international banking convenience.

name: CustIQ Home Loan
description: Home purchase or construction loan with competitive floating interest rates, flexible tenure up to 30 years, and balance transfer facility.
features: No prepayment penalty on floating rate loans

name: CustIQ Personal Loan
description: Instant collateral-free personal loan for salaried and self-employed individuals. Disbursal within 24 hours for pre-approved customers.

name: CustIQ Car Loan
description: New and used car financing with on-the-spot approval, tie-ups with all major dealerships, and attractive interest rates for salaried professionals.
features: Finance up to 90% of car value

name: CustIQ Education Loan
description: Education loan covering tuition, hostel, books, and living expenses for undergraduate, postgraduate, and professional courses in India and abroad.
features: Loan up to ₹1.5 crores for abroad studies
Loan up to ₹20 lakhs for India studies
No collateral for loans up to ₹7.5 lakhs
Covers tuition, hostel, laptop, travel expenses

name: CustIQ Fixed Deposit — Standard
description: Guaranteed returns fixed deposit with tenures from 7 days to 10 years. Senior citizen rate is 0.50% higher than the standard rate.
features: Loan against FD up to 90% of value
Eligible for tax saver 5-year FD (80C deduction)

name: CustIQ Tax Saver Fixed Deposit
description: Five-year lock-in FD qualifying for Section 80C tax deduction up to ₹1.5 lakhs per annum. Higher interest rate than standard FD.
features: Interest taxable as per income slab
Joint account allowed (only first holder gets 80C benefit)

name: CustIQ Mutual Fund — SIP Gateway
description: Systematic Investment Plan gateway offering curated basket of top-performing equity, debt, and hybrid mutual funds with a minimum SIP of ₹500/month.
features: Mobile app tracking with portfolio analytics

name: CustIQ Life Insurance — Term Plan
description: Pure term life insurance offering high coverage at low premiums. Coverage up to ₹5 crores with critical illness and accidental disability riders.

name: CustIQ Health Insurance — Family Floater
description: Comprehensive family health insurance covering hospitalisation, day-care procedures, maternity, and OPD. Cashless network at 10,000+ hospitals.
features: Floater cover for self, spouse, 2 children

name: CustIQ Platinum Credit Card
description: Lifestyle credit card with 5X reward points on dining and travel, complimentary lounge access, fuel surcharge waiver, and comprehensive travel insurance.
features: 2X reward points on all other spends
Comprehensive travel insurance up to ₹1 crore
Annual fee waived on ₹1.5 lakh annual spend

name: CustIQ PPF Account
description: Public Provident Fund account with government-backed returns, full tax exemption under EEE category, and 15-year lock-in period with partial withdrawal from year 7.
features: Loan against PPF from 3rd to 6th year

name: CustIQ HDB / Public Housing Loan
description: Government-subsidised housing loan for HDB flat purchase in Singapore. Pegged to CPF OA rate + 0.1%, one of the lowest mortgage rates available.
features: CPF OA savings can be used for repayment

name: CustIQ Superannuation Linked Savings (AUS)
description: Australian superannuation-linked savings product offering concessional tax rates on contributions. Employer contributes 11% of ordinary time earnings under SG legislation.
features: First Home Super Saver Scheme eligible

name: CustIQ Stocks & Shares ISA (UK)
description: UK Individual Savings Account wrapper for equity and fund investments. Up to £20,000 annual allowance with zero tax on gains, dividends, and interest.
features: Zero capital gains tax on returns
Flexible ISA — withdraw and re-subscribe in same tax year

name: CustIQ Islamic Home Finance (Murabaha)
description: Sharia-compliant home finance using Murabaha structure. No interest charged; bank purchases property and sells to customer at an agreed profit margin. Approved by Sharia Supervisory Board.
features: Finance up to 80% of property value

name: CustIQ CPF Investment Account (SG)
description: Singapore Central Provident Fund investment scheme allowing CPF Ordinary Account savings above S$20,000 to be invested in approved unit trusts, ETFs, and government bonds.
features: Invest CPF OA savings above S$20,000

name: CustIQ Takaful Family Protection (Islamic)
description: Sharia-compliant family takaful plan providing death, total permanent disability, and critical illness coverage. Structured on Wakalah (agency) model with surplus sharing.
features: Applicable for Muslim and non-Muslim customers in MY/UAE/SA

name: CustIQ SEPA Business Account (EU)
description: Euro-denominated business current account with full SEPA payment suite including instant SEPA Credit Transfer (SCT Inst) and SEPA Direct Debit mandates. IBAN-based account suitable for EU/EEA businesses.
features: Full SEPA Credit Transfer & Direct Debit
SEPA Instant (SCT Inst) in under 10 seconds
ISO 20022 XML file uploads for bulk payments

name: CustIQ Global Multi-Currency Account
description: Multi-currency transactional account supporting 12+ currencies in a single account number. Ideal for frequent travellers, NRIs, and globally mobile professionals across APAC/EMEA.
features: Real-time FX conversion at interbank rates
Mobile app with live exchange rates
No foreign transaction fees on card spend
